text: On 07-Mar-2025, SCII celebrated: Women’s Day. This is a special occasion to honor and appreciate the incredible women in our organization and their invaluable contributions.
On 01-Jan-2025, SCII celebrated: New Year Celebration. As we step into another exciting year, let’s take a moment to come together and celebrate the start of 2025!
On 22-Nov-2024, SCII celebrated: Annual Day Celebration.
On 19-Nov-2024, SCII celebrated: Men’s Day Celebration.
On 09-Nov-2024, SCII celebrated: Sports Day Celebration.
On 31-Oct-2024, SCII celebrated: Farewell of Alex San (SCII CEO). Goodbyes are not the end; they mark a new beginning. This year, we bid farewell to our dedicated, visionary, and unwavering CEO.".
On 11-Oct-2024, SCII celebrated: Ayudh Pooja 2024.

On 13-Sep-2024, SCII celebrated: Engineers’ Day celebration. This year we celebrated Engineer’s Day by conducting a quiz, a Speech by Director, Kamiyama San, and playing a video cast on SCII engineers.

On 29-Feb-2024, SCII celebrated: International Mother Language Day Celebration. International Mother Language Day celebrates the diversity and richness of languages and cultures, By celebrating this day in the office has allowed us to know the diverse people around us.
On 01-Jan-2024, SCII celebrated: New Year. Celebrated New Year together.
On 21-Dec-2023, SCII celebrated: Christmas. Celebrated Christmas with gift exchanging, activities, and a wonderful performance by Yogeesh.
On 01-Dec-2023, SCII celebrated: Annual Day 2023. SCII celebrated the 18th Annual Day
On 24-Nov-2023, SCII celebrated: Partner’s Day Event at KSC.. SCII members who are in KSC participated in the Partner’s Day event organized at KSC.
On 10-Nov-2023, SCII celebrated: Gift distribution.. This year we have presented gifts to employees on the Diwali occasion
On 04-Nov-2023, SCII celebrated: Sports Day.. To build team bonding and cheer the victory.

On 10-Jun-2023, SCII celebrated: World Environmental Day. For the celebration of World Environmental Day 2023, we visited Darvin International School, Sulagitti Narasamma Campus, where we conducted an environmental awareness program along with activities, which were enjoyed and actively participated by the students.

On 27-May-2023, SCII celebrated: Act of Kindness. With the help and contribution of SCII employees and management, we have collected a good amount of helpful items (Groceries & Stationaries) for needy old people and children. We Visited Shree Shiva Shikhshanika Seva Ashrama, Kadaranahalli, Mydala post, Tumkur, for conducting the event “Act of Kindness” where we shared happiness, and joy, and distributed the collected goods with them.

No language is assigned to this page. From The Director's Desk
"I have been working with Indian engineers here at SCII since September 2013, involved in system development and global human resource development for Japanese companies. I am truly amazed every day at the excellence of Indian engineers and their speed of approaching new things. Combining KSC's vast knowledge-base of over 50 years of system development experience with the skills of young and talented Indian engineers, I want to create a new system development mechanism."
Mr. Junichi Kamiyama
Director,System Consultant Information India (P) Ltd.

No language is assigned to this page. Building Information
Main Building :
SCII building is built in such a way that building is having proper space, good ventilation and
proper sunlight. The ambience around the building is close to nature and help to provide employees with a calm environment to work. Workplace/workstation :
SCII building ensures congenial working condition. Office employees may concentrate their mind in
work under congenial working condition. A systematic arrangement of SCII office will give naturally
maximum efficiency at a minimum cost on all occasions. Security office:
Safety and security are first, for that, in SCII we have well established security office. Security
office have record of all visitors on paper. This record should list the visitor’s name, company,
purpose, time in, and time out. Video Surveillance is also available. Cafeteria:
Cafeteria of SCII is a place where employees can have a short meeting with coffee, can have lunch
together during lunch hours.

No language is assigned to this page. ENTRY & EXIT PROCEDURE
Business Days
|
Non-Business Day
Guidelines:
Two security Guards will be working at all time. During transition time, if there is only one Security guard, he will be responsible for job of both Security Guards. SCII Employees who have to work on a non-business day have to take permission from PM/Group Leader. The list of employees working on a non-business day (Holiday working list) will be given to Security Guards and Japanese Staff. Generally, only the persons in this list will be allowed to work on a non-business day. In case of Emergency (when working on a holiday is not pre-scheduled), the staff coming to office have to take the permission from the Person In Charge on that day. If there is no Person In Charge, the Japanese staff who stays in the guest house will act as Person In Charge. A visitor will be accompanied by the company staff through out his/her stay in the building.

Charge. A visitor will be accompanied by the company staff through out his/her stay in the building.All the information has to be filled in the Visitor Information Register and Visitor Information Slip. Security Guard 1 has to make sure that the information is complete.

General Guidelines
Before coming to work each day, check if you are experiencing flu like symptoms
If Yes, Do not come to work, Inform your GL/Manager about the same.
How to Protect Yourself & Others(Prevention)
Wear face coverings at all times in office
Maintain social distancing
Wash your hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds. Use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer that contains at least 60% alcohol if soap and water are not available.
Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth with unwashed hands.
Avoid close contact with people who are sick.
Cover your cough or sneeze with a tissue, then throw the tissue in the trash.
Clean and disinfect frequently touched objects and surfaces.
Maintain at least 1 meter (3 feet) distance between yourself and other people, particularly those who are coughing, sneezing and have a fever.
Stay home if you feel unwell.

Library Rules & Regulations
1. When the Employee needs to borrow the books, ask the Library Management member to open the lock of the book shelf which is located in GF Open Space East
. 2. After taking book from the shelf, the Employee needs to sign the registration book, which is kept by the Library Management member, by agreeing with the rules of lending books. 3. If the Employee fails to find the book which the Employee needs in the book shelf, then the Employee can find the person who has borrowed the book from the registration book. 4. The Employee should not sublet the books to other person. The registration book has to be maintained properly. 5. The Employee can take the books home, but have to bring the books to the office every working day. 6. A Book will be issued for 30 days only. However, issued books may be recalled earlier, if urgently required by the Library.

or 30 days only. However, issued books may be recalled earlier, if urgently required by the Library.If member wants to keep it for more than 30 days, he/she needs to renew it. 7. A Book must be returned in the same condition in which it was issued. 8. In case of marking/underlining / folding of pages of books, the cost of the latest edition of the book will be charged from the borrower. 9. The Library Management member should check the book shelf once every month to take the inventory of all books. Rules of lending Library
I agree with the following rules and borrow the books. •	I will handle the books carefully. •	I will compensate the books in case of losing the books or damaging the books. •	I will not sublet the books the third person. •	Even if I take the books home, I will bring the books to the office every working day.
